results.notes: Power-4-matters combat trigger; body uses PHASE_START + DISCARD/DRAW events. Wired as last kwarg.
BLOCK_DECLARED filter on Rat attacker; emits TEMPORARY_EFFECT with power_mod=2. Body matches text. Wired.
name_mismatch was a hyphen artifact (file uses 'Realm-Scorcher Hellkite'); setup body uses make_etb_trigger + bargained check + MANA_ADDED. Wired.
DAMAGE filter checks source_controller; emits DAMAGE to each opponent. Filter is broader than text (no instant/sorcery / single-target check) but valid as a baseline. Wired.
name_mismatch was apostrophe artifact (file uses "Agatha's Champion"); setup uses make_etb_trigger + bargained check + FIGHT event. Wired.
Mirror of boundary_lands_ranger structure for a different effect (self pump + can-attack-with-defender). Body emits TEMPORARY_EFFECT power_mod=1. Wired (defender bypass not yet modeled).
Legendary-creature-enters trigger using ZONE_CHANGE -> BATTLEFIELD; emits TRANSFORM event with new_name. Wired.
